dashboard.description: User Reports - Extended Log Analysis provides in-depth insights into user activity logs, helping track access patterns, anomalies, and system interactions. With detailed filtering and visualization, it enhances security monitoring, compliance auditing, and performance analysis. Ideal for administrators and security teams
